description_long: This is a rectangular, double-unit cabinet or shelving system with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior sides and back are finished in a light wood grain, while the top, front, and interior shelving surfaces are a smooth white material. The left unit is fully closed, while the right unit features a hinged door that opens to reveal two spacious white shelves inside. The cabinet is constructed with clean, straight edges and no visible handles, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall build suggests it is suitable for storage in urban environments such as garages, offices, or communal spaces. The design is practical for organizing items while maintaining a visually clean and uncluttered look.
description: A modern, double-unit cabinet with light wood sides and white shelves, featuring a hinged door on one side. Its clean, handleless design is ideal for organized storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both units, with the right door open to reveal two white shelves and the left unit fully closed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and wood grain of the cabinet, with the open door of the right unit visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white backs of both units, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wood grain panels and the open door extending from the right unit.
